tools.name: list_products
tools.title: List products
tools.description: List products from the Pañalera La Elegancia del Baby catalog. Optionally filter by category id (panales, alimentacion, jugueteria, paseadores, teteros, cuidado, ropa, accesorios, montables) and limit the number of results.

categoryId.description: Optional category id to filter by (e.g. 'panales').

limit.description: Optional max number of products to return.

tools.name: get_product
tools.title: Get product details
tools.description: Get full details of a single product from the Pañalera La Elegancia del Baby catalog by its id, including description, features, brand, price, discount, stock and recommended age.

tools.name: search_products
tools.title: Search products
tools.description: Full-text search across the Pañalera La Elegancia del Baby catalog. Matches product name, description, brand, category, features, size and recommended age.

tools.name: list_branches
tools.title: List branches
tools.description: List all Pañalera La Elegancia del Baby physical branches with their city, department and opening hours (weekday and Sunday/holiday schedules).

tools.name: get_business_info
tools.title: Get business info
tools.description: Get general information about Pañalera La Elegancia del Baby: contact (WhatsApp), payment methods, social media, shipping options and product categories.
